name: Symptoms showed up weeks after work accident, too late?

mainEntity.name: Symptoms showed up weeks after work accident, too late?

acceptedAnswer.text: No, report when known—docs prove connection.
acceptedAnswer.description: No, file if connected to work; delayed symptoms common, report within deadlines. Key factors: Medical nexus proves link; Utah 180 days from knowledge. Treat promptly. Attorney gathers retro evidence.
